phase: ddharmon-ui v1.6 (live demo + reproducibility + run-options cleanup)
phase_name: Live-replay demo run (backend + static Netlify), reproducibility machinery (frozen substrate + cached responses), a Reproducibility popover, and a run-options cleanup (removed min-cluster-size + Sync). BYOK backend v1.5 merged to main (PR #3).
task: BUILT + GREEN on feature/demo-run (12de065); committed locally; NOT pushed/PR'd/deployed — awaiting local-dev review
status: demo + reproducibility + options cleanup BUILT + GREEN (18 backend tests; frontend typecheck + VITE_STATIC build). DEPLOY HELD for the user (limited Netlify credits).
deploy_policy: USER-GATED — never run ./scripts/deploy-preview.sh without an explicit go-ahead (limited Netlify credits). User reviews in local dev, deploys infrequently in batches. See memory feedback_netlify_deploy_on_call.
branch: feature/demo-run @ 12de065 (off main @ bc1cffe, which has BYOK PR #3 merged). Committed locally, not pushed.

completed_tasks.name: Resumed via /gsd-resume-work ddharmon ui; reviewed UI-thread state (separate repo from the pipeline .planning)

BYOK API-key field (FRONTEND only): masked input + Eye/EyeOff reveal + sk-ant- validation on home.tsx, shown only when runMode != preview; sent as transport-only x-anthropic-key header via startHarmonize(files,config,apiKey?) — NEVER in the config JSON (that becomes the persisted run_config); in-memory React state only. Dropped the now-misleading 'needs API key' from the Sync dropdown label + updated run-mode help.

Landing: fit hero + 'How a run works' above the fold on a 14" MBP (~832px) — was overflowing ~309px. Shrank hero padding, viz footprint (max-w 540→390), widened text col, trimmed spacing/card padding. Kept text-6xl headline. Also global AppShell content padding py-8→py-6.

Landing: fluid clamp() vh-based spacing so the hero fills taller monitors instead of leaving a blank band (blank-below ~250px→~58px at 2000x1047); floors = the compact 14" values, capped maxima. Chose fluid over fragile 100vh force-fit (user-confirmed).
Pushed branch, opened PR #2, MERGED to main (merge commit fe40703); synced local main. Pre-merge checks: frontend typecheck+build green, 16 backend tests pass.

remaining_tasks.name: THE real BYOK follow-up (backend): read the x-anthropic-key header in backend/app.py::start_batch → thread it through run_harmonization/adapter → into the core Anthropic clients as api_key=... Hold in memory for the job only; never os.environ, never job files/logs.
remaining_tasks.note: BUILT + GREEN (2026-07-05, PR #3). app.py::start_batch reads the X-Anthropic-Key header (frontend already sent it, api.ts:52) → in-memory thread kwarg → run_harmonization(api_key=) → run_pipeline(api_key=) → sync AnthropicClient(api_key=) / batch _batch_stage→submit_and_wait(api_key=). CORE half (research repo feature/harmonization-v2-split-aware @ 092bc94): non-breaking optional api_key on AnthropicClient + batch submit/retrieve/wait → anthropic.Anthropic(api_key=) at all 4 sites; None → unchanged ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env fallback. SECURITY (test-locked): key NEVER in run_config (store.create persists it), never os.environ, never logs; test asserts the secret appears nowhere in the persisted job. 17 backend tests pass. STILL GATED: prod is static/backend-less so the header is sent-but-ignored until the P3 backend deploys; and the core api_key param must reach PyPI (post-0.9.0 forward-port) before a PyPI-pinned prod backend can use it.

remaining_tasks.name: OPTIONAL: delete stale local+remote branches feature/ui-guide-tooltips-notebook-demo (merged) and feature/landing-hero (old, merged).
OPTIONAL: 3 pre-existing Dependabot alerts on main (1 high/1 moderate/1 low) — NOT from this arc (adds no new deps). Address separately.
(user-gated, coupled 1.0 gate) P3: stand up the FastAPI backend on Lightsail; this is where BYOK backend + real runs become live.
(v3) real demo precompute + live-replay demo run.
remaining_tasks.note: BUILT (2026-07-05). Real 3x200 (AoU/CLSA/UKBB -> 350 records) built by the production pipeline (paid batch ~$3-4). build_demos.py gained --replay (byte-identical proof), --fresh-drift (variance), --fixtures-only; captures phaseTimings + a reproducibility block; emits the backend snapshot + the static fixture (result-demo-*.json + jobs.json merge) for VITE_STATIC. start_demo paces a LIVE replay via JobStore/SSE (stable id, demo:true); frontend does a client-side paced replay in static mode so the Netlify site feels live; single 'Load demo' (no checkboxes); Runs 'Demo' badge. REPRODUCIBILITY: run_pipeline freezes/reloads the substrate + _batch_stage uses resume_and_wait -> ship + 2 replays byte-identical; fresh run drifts 350->320 records / 298 recur / 260 same-verdict (~85%/87%); a Reproducibility popover states this on every run. Run-options: removed min-cluster-size (engine auto-scales via _auto_min_cluster_size), dropped Sync from the UI. Requires core resume_and_wait(api_key=) @ af2c010 (research repo). Deploy HELD.

remaining_tasks.name: User reviews the demo batch in local dev; then (user's call) push feature/demo-run -> PR -> merge -> deploy. Runtime-verify the static client-side replay + the reproducibility popover in a browser.
OPTIONAL backlog: topbar circos→official PH icon; Works Cited tweaks (Yang→TACL DOI, Mimno/Newman no-DOI).

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to delete the two stale merged branches
human_actions_pending.context: left them rather than auto-deleting the working branch

human_actions_pending.action: Gather team feedback on the live v1.1–v1.4 arc at https://ddharmon.netlify.app/
human_actions_pending.context: whole arc is now on main + prod

decisions.decision: Real runs use BYOK (user enters their own key), not a shared operator key or hybrid
decisions.rationale: user choice via AskUserQuestion; each user pays for their own runs

decisions.decision: Build the BYOK FRONTEND now even though the backend isn't ready
decisions.rationale: user scoped it; the live deploy is static anyway, and the backend is a non-trivial core change (4 client constructors)

decisions.decision: Key rides as a transport-only x-anthropic-key header, never in the config JSON; held in component state only (no local/session storage)
decisions.rationale: the config body is persisted as the job's run_config — a key there would leak to disk/logs

decisions.decision: Landing uses fluid clamp() vh-based spacing, NOT a 100vh force-fit / flex-1 fill
decisions.rationale: force-fit is fragile across zoom + browser chrome and needs magic pixel offsets; clamp degrades gracefully and is standard practice (user-confirmed)

decisions.decision: Merge PR #2 with a merge commit; no companion core Phenome-Health/ddharmon PR
decisions.rationale: consistent with how PR #1 merged; this arc is UI-only

next_action: Demo + reproducibility + run-options cleanup is BUILT + GREEN on feature/demo-run (12de065), committed locally. AWAITING the user's LOCAL-DEV review: `DDHARMON_UI_SEED=1 DDHARMON_CDE_DIR=<core>/data/examples ./dev.sh` -> open /demo -> 'Load demo' (watch the live phase pacing), check the Runs 'Demo' badge + the 'Reproducibility' popover on the results header. THEN, ONLY ON THE USER'S CALL: push feature/demo-run -> PR -> merge -> ./scripts/deploy-preview.sh. DDHARMON_CDE_DIR=<core>/data/examples .venv/bin/python scripts/build_demos.py --mode batch --replay 2 --fresh-drift`; static fixtures only ($0): `... --fixtures-only`. BYOK backend (v1.5) is merged to main but still needs P3 + core api_key on PyPI to go live.
context_notes: Session arc (v1.6): resumed both repos -> built BYOK backend (PR #3, merged) -> fixed a pyright CI failure on canonical ddharmon main (PR #22) -> built the LIVE demo run. Demo = real 3x200 (AoU/CLSA/UKBB -> 350 records) via the production pipeline (paid batch ~$3-4). Reproducibility: frozen substrate + cached responses -> byte-identical replay (proven 2/2); fresh run drifts ~15% records / ~13% verdicts (UMAP/HDBSCAN + LLM not bitwise-reproducible), largely absorbed by split-aware. Removed min-cluster-size (auto-scaled now) + Sync from the UI. Works on BOTH the backend (SSE paced replay) and the static Netlify build (client-side paced replay of a bundled fixture). All GREEN; committed locally on feature/demo-run; NOT pushed/PR'd/deployed — deploy is user-gated. The UI-thread state is in THIS repo's .planning; the pipeline thread is SEPARATE in ~/ai-coding/ph-arpa-data-harmonization/.planning.
